leveraged_product.reason: Leveraged trading is a separate product surface and needs eligibility, collateral, position, risk, lifecycle, and reconciliation audit.

contract_product.reason: No standard futures, perpetual, or options contract API is exposed by the current official/API profile.

official_sources.evidence: Independent Reserve product material includes leveraged trading as a separate product surface, not a standard futures/perpetual/options API in the current adapter profile.

runtime_isolation: Do not route Independent Reserve leveraged trading through spot runtime until product eligibility, leverage/risk state, collateral/balance/position parsers, private lifecycle, and reconciliation are audited.
required_audit_gaps: leveraged trading account eligibility and permissions
leverage, collateral, position, PnL, and risk parser fixtures
product-scoped order lifecycle request specs and parsers
post-write readback/reconciliation and live dry-run gate
